name: Warm Springs Fried Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients; cut in butter until crumbly.
2. Gradually add warm milk, stirring into a soft dough that is easy to handle.
3. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and pliable but not sticky.
4. Divide dough into 6-8 portions and turn each piece lightly with melted butter.
5. Cover and let rest for 30-45 minutes.
6. Roll each portion into a round, about 5-6 inches in diameter and 1/4 inch thick.
7. Heat fat to 365°F (185°C) in a deep fryer or heavy skillet.
8. Fry dough rounds until golden brown on one side; turn carefully and fry the other side, avoiding piercing the crust.
9. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately.
